title: Intensely Smoky Brazilian Vegetable Skillet
description: A flavorful and healthy Brazilian-inspired vegetable skillet dish, featuring smoky paprika and sous-vide cooked vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: smoky paprika
ingredients.notes: Spanish or Hungarian paprika works well

instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the sliced onion, bell pepper, and zucchini with salt, black pepper, and smoky paprika.
Place the seasoned vegetables in a sous-vide bag and seal.
Sous-vide cook the vegetables for 30 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a large tava-griddle over medium-high heat.
Remove the vegetables from the sous-vide bag and add to the tava-griddle.
Add the diced tomato and minced garlic to the tava-griddle and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Serve the vegetable skillet hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
